Book a Table

Inspired by the meyhanes of Türkiye. Shared plates, fire-kissed food, and unforgettable nights.

3201 Adams Avenue, San Diego, CA 92116

Opening Hours

Tuesday-Thursday: 5p-11p
Friday-Saturday: 5p-1a
Sunday: 5p-9p

Flow with the tides

Gather, Feast,
Repeat.

From fire-kissed flavors to late-night rhythms — meze, rakı, cocktails and music await at Bosforo.
